conversations.message:
Used tool: view

Result: {
  "resultType": "success",
  "textResultForLlm": "1. # Agent Workflow & Handoff Protocol
2. 
3. its a simulation of a comedy show.
4. 
5. ## How Handoffs Work
6. 
7. The **Handoff:** format is how you **invoke/call other agents** as subagents or team members to continue the workflow.
8. 
9. **Format:** `**Handoff:** @agent-name "message about what you did"`
10. 
11. This is an **ACTION** - writing this line will trigger the specified agent to execute the next step.
12. 
13. ## Agent Handoff Chain
14. 
15. | From Agent | To Agent | Condition | Handoff Format |
16. |------------|----------|-----------|----------------|
17. | **comedian** | heckler | always | `**Handoff:** @heckler "[message]"` |
18. | **heckler** | comedian | if joke rating < 8 out of 10 | `**Handoff:** @comedian "[message]"` |
19. | **heckler** | audience | if joke rating >= 8 out of 10 | `**Handoff:** @audience "[message]"` |
20. | **audience** | comedian | till 10 funny jokes are delivered | `**Handoff:** @comedian "[message]"` |
21. 
22. ## Standard Workflow
23. 
24. ```
25. @comedian
26.   Γåô
27. @heckler
28.   Γåô (if joke rating < 8 out of 10)       Γåô (if joke rating >= 8 out of 10)
29. @comedian (cycle)                      @audience                          
30.   Γåô
31.   Γåô (till 10 funny jokes are delivered)
32. @comedian (cycle back)
33. ```
34. "
}

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
1. # Agent Workflow & Handoff Protocol
2. 
3. its a simulation of a comedy show.
4. 
5. ## How Handoffs Work
6. 
7. The **Handoff:** format is how you **invoke/call other agents** as subagents or team members to continue the workflow.
8. 
9. **Format:** `**Handoff:** @agent-name "message about what you did"`
10. 
11. This is an **ACTION** - writing this line will trigger the specified agent to execute the next step.
12. 
13. ## Agent Handoff Chain
14. 
15. | From Agent | To Agent | Condition | Handoff Format |
16. |------------|----------|-----------|----------------|
17. | **comedian** | heckler | always | `**Handoff:** @heckler "[message]"` |
18. | **heckler** | comedian | if joke rating < 8 out of 10 | `**Handoff:** @comedian "[message]"` |
19. | **heckler** | audience | if joke rating >= 8 out of 10 | `**Handoff:** @audience "[message]"` |
20. | **audience** | comedian | till 10 funny jokes are delivered | `**Handoff:** @comedian "[message]"` |
21. 
22. ## Standard Workflow
23. 
24. ```
25. @comedian
26.   Γåô
27. @heckler
28.   Γåô (if joke rating < 8 out of 10)       Γåô (if joke rating >= 8 out of 10)
29. @comedian (cycle)                      @audience                          
30.   Γåô
31.   Γåô (till 10 funny jokes are delivered)
32. @comedian (cycle back)
33. ```
34.

toolArgs.query: CREATE TABLE jokes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, joke TEXT, rating INTEGER, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending');

INSERT INTO jokes (joke, rating, status) VALUES
('She looked surprised (eyebrows)', 8, 'approved'),
('Facial hair grew on me', 8, 'approved'),
('Dog said nothing (2-2)', 9, 'approved'),
('Cows wear bells - horns dont work', 8, 'approved'),
('Anti-gravity book impossible to put down', 9, 'approved'),
('Coffee got mugged', 8, 'approved'),
('Flamingo - put my foot down', 9, 'approved'),
('Doctor - stop going to those places', 9, 'approved'),
('Eggs crack each other up', 8, 'approved'),
('Skeleton - beer and a mop', 10, 'approved');
